text.tspan: Aquaculture is the farming of aquatic organisms including fish, molluscs, crustaceans and aquatic plants. Aquaculture
production specifically refers to output from aquaculture activities, which are designated for final harvest for
Data source: Multiple sources compiled by World Bank (2024)
